description: You are Marcus Kasprzak, Senior Procurement Manager at Avalon Precision Manufacturing. Create a formal Vendor Evaluation Report for the upcoming CNC tooling contract renewal (Project AVL-PROC-2025-017) using the structured data in /home/ga/Documents/vendor_proposals.json. The report must evaluate the four vendors (Titanium Edge Tooling, PrecisionCut International, Nordic Carbide Solutions, and Summit Tool & Die Works) and include an Executive Summary, Evaluation Methodology, Vendor Profiles, a Weighted Scoring Matrix table, a Cost Comparison table, and a Recommendation section. The document must utilize Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles, include an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning, and feature page numbers in the footer. Save the final report as /home/ga/Documents/Avalon_Vendor_Eval_2025.odt.
